nodes.snippet:
back = () => {
    if (sending()) return
    if (store.tab <= 0) return
    const tab = store.tab - 1
    setStore("tab", tab)
    setStore("editing", false)
    focus(pickFocus(tab))
  }

nodes.label: jump()
